constructs.assessment: Strong world-shaper with system-level interventions; prefers to restructure problem structures rather than operate within given constraints
constructs.finding: Obama demonstrates consistent agency through large-scale system redesign: ACA restructured health insurance markets (ev_001-002), Dodd-Frank rebuilt financial regulatory architecture (ev_003), energy blueprint attempted comprehensive energy system transformation (ev_005). He regularly pushes institutional boundaries when blocked—declaring 'Year of Action' after Congressional resistance and issuing executive orders on minimum wage when legislation failed (ev_019). His approach treats legislative obstruction as a signal to find alternative actuation pathways, not a reason to retreat. This indicates他把反馈理解为系统需要重新配置的信号，而非行动不可行的证据。

constructs.assessment: Strongly empirical with quantified metrics as primary evidence; decisions grounded in measurable outcomes rather than ideological priors
constructs.finding: Obama's speeches consistently deploy specific numerical evidence: 11 million jobs over 57 months (ev_025), $11 billion recovered for 26 million consumers through CFPB (ev_028), wind tripled and solar multiplied 30x (ev_040), deficits falling at fastest rate since WWII (ev_016). When confronting opposition, he typically cites surveys showing majority small business support for minimum wage (ev_023) or bipartisan Senate passage (ev_011) rather than appealing to values alone. His framing of accomplishments as 'America's resurgence is real' (ev_024, ev_047) treats economic data as the primary validation mechanism. This suggests他将可量化指标视为系统状态的主要传感器，而非舆论或轶事证据。

constructs.assessment: Balanced between abstract principles and operational specifics; uses philosophy to frame but metrics to prove
constructs.finding: Obama articulates abstract economic philosophy ('middle-out economics' in ev_021) and governance principles (ev_036 on democracy as collective tool), yet pairs these with concrete specifications: exact dollar thresholds ($10.10 minimum wage), specific timelines (7 days until transportation funding expires in ev_011), measurable targets (cut oil imports by one-third by 2025 in ev_005). This dual register suggests他既能抽象到哲学层面又能降到操作层面，形成闭环：principle驱动方向，metrics验证进度。他不偏好纯形式化但在需要时能进入精确模式。

constructs.assessment: High control orientation through institutional mechanisms; builds durable constraints on future actors
constructs.finding: Obama systematically builds control mechanisms: veto threats against Dodd-Frank repeal (ev_029), executive orders creating contractor minimum wage (ev_017), debt ceiling refusal to negotiate (ev_015). His government modernization initiative (ev_037) brought Silicon Valley expertise to create better information systems and enrollment processes—treating bureaucratic control as an engineering problem. He explicitly called for 90-day up-or-down votes on nominations to limit Senate obstruction (ev_010). This indicates他将控制理解为通过制度设计和信息流实现，而非个人权力施压。建立了反馈机制（metrics, CFPB enforcement）以确保系统保持在期望状态。

constructs.assessment: Mission-priority with high tolerance for political friction; willing to publicly criticize opponents to drive agenda
constructs.finding: Obama publicly criticized Congressional Republicans repeatedly (ev_020: 'They've said no to raising minimum wage, no to equal pay, no to restoring unemployment insurance'), called out Senate obstruction as contrary to founders' intent (ev_010), and declared 'Year of Action' as direct response to legislative blockade (ev_019-020). Yet he maintained openness to bipartisan cooperation when possible—celebrating bipartisan budget deal and education bill as 'Christmas miracles' (ev_048), cited AFL-CIO and Chamber of Commerce joint support for transportation (ev_008). This suggests他愿意承担关系成本以推进mission，但将bipartisanship视为战略优势而非让步。冲突被工具化而非回避。

constructs.assessment: Moderate risk tolerance with defensive positioning; accepts confrontation on red lines but seeks structural safeguards
constructs.finding: Obama took major risks: sequester confrontation (ev_013-014), debt ceiling standoff where he refused negotiation (ev_015), Iran nuclear deal. Yet he consistently sought to bound risk through institutional mechanisms—calling for balanced deficit reduction to prevent arbitrary cuts (ev_013), building international coalitions for Paris climate agreement (ev_034, ev_041). His Cancer Moonshot (ev_042-043) shows willingness to attempt high-impact initiatives with uncertain timelines but structured through cross-agency task force. This indicates他在高可见度风险上采取防御性底线立场（不会谈判债务上限），但在可接受领域内接受试验和迭代。

constructs.assessment: Selective hierarchy engagement; leverages formal authority when aligned, bypasses it when not
constructs.finding: Obama uses presidential power directly when Congressional hierarchy blocked action: executive orders on contractor minimum wage (ev_017), 'Year of Action' framing (ev_015), veto commitments (ev_029). Yet he also attempts to reform hierarchy itself—calling for elimination of Senate filibuster on nominations (ev_010). His government modernization partnership with Silicon Valley (ev_037) created parallel expertise structure. He publicly called for civic participation beyond electoral cycles (ev_046), suggesting belief that popular mandate can override institutional resistance. This indicates他对权力等级的理解是functional而非reverent——authority是工具而非正当性来源。

constructs.assessment: Escalation through public pressure with data-driven persuasion; transforms conflict into information campaign
constructs.finding: Obama typically escalates conflicts by taking them public—weekly addresses criticizing Congressional obstruction (ev_020), specific deadline framing to create urgency (ev_011: 'seven days away' from transportation funding crisis), documenting human costs of sequester to mobilize public opinion (ev_014). He uses metrics as weapons: 'majority of small business owners support $10.10 minimum wage' (ev_023). His debt ceiling stance (ev_015) framed opponents as threatening national credibility. This indicates他将冲突理解为信息问题而非谈判问题——通过公开化将对手置于不利叙事中。冲突很少被延迟或压抑，而是被放大。

constructs.assessment: Long-term orientation with structural goals; accepts short-term friction for durable system change
constructs.finding: Obama pursues multi-administration horizons: ACA designed for long-term Medicare solvency (ev_002), Paris climate agreement as generational commitment (ev_041: 'leave a better, cleaner, safer future for our children'), TPP to write global trade rules for decades (ev_031). Yet he also celebrates short-term metrics (ev_025: 11 million jobs in 57 months) and sets near-term targets (ev_005: one-third oil import reduction by 2025). His farewell emphasized sustained civic engagement 'over the full span of a lifetime' (ev_046). This suggests他将long-term structural change作为primary goal，但用short-term metrics来maintain momentum and demonstrate progress。

constructs.assessment: Strong preference for structural redesign when system-level failure occurs; patches used only when rebuild blocked
constructs.finding: ACA represented comprehensive health insurance market restructuring (ev_001-002), Dodd-Frank rebuilt financial regulatory architecture (ev_003, ev_028-029). When structural change blocked, Obama turned to executive actions as patches (ev_017 minimum wage order, ev_019 'Year of Action'), but framed these as interim measures calling for legislative extension (ev_014: 'called on Congress to raise federal minimum wage nationwide'). Cancer Moonshot designed to restructure research coordination across agencies (ev_042-043). This indicateshe treats patches as unsatisfactory compromise, maintaining pressure for structural solutions while accepting interim functionality。

constructs.assessment: High self-awareness with consistent pattern reflection; demonstrates learning from feedback loops
constructs.finding: Obama explicitly reflected on past trade deal shortcomings (ev_027: 'I'm the first to admit that past trade deals haven't always lived up to the hype')—demonstrating ability to acknowledge failures without abandoning agenda. His government modernization initiative (ev_037) showed willingness to bring external expertise to correct internal blind spots. His farewell address (ev_044-047) explicitly attributed success to collective action rather than individual leadership, showing awareness that presidential agency operates within larger system. He framed climate progress as legacy to build upon (ev_041) rather than personal achievement. This indicateshe treats his own position as one node in feedback network, not as central controller。

emergent_constructs.definition: How effectively a leader integrates real-time public feedback into policy actuation—treating public opinion and engagement as continuous sensor data informing strategy adjustment
emergent_constructs.finding: Obama's weekly addresses function as systematic public sensing mechanism—he directly reports economic metrics, cites survey data, and frames outcomes in terms of collective American achievement. His government tech modernization (ev_037) explicitly aimed to improve feedback loops between government and citizens (easier health insurance enrollment). His repeated emphasis on civic participation beyond elections (ev_046) suggests he views public engagement as ongoing sensor network rather than periodic electoral signal. This creates closed-loop governance where policy outputs are continuously monitored against public response, and communication strategy is calibrated based on observed reception. The pattern differs from pure representative democracy (periodic elections) or pure technocracy (expert-driven decisions) by creating continuous feedback channel between executive and public. Evidence: ev_032, ev_044, ev_046

emergent_constructs.definition: Recognition that policy domains are interconnected and that effective actuation in one domain requires understanding feedback effects across domains
emergent_constructs.finding: Obama's 'middle-out' economic philosophy (ev_021) explicitly frames middle-class prosperity as driver of overall economic health, treating economic system as interconnected rather than zero-sum. His energy blueprint (ev_005) connected domestic drilling, fuel efficiency, and clean energy as complementary levers. His veteran hiring initiative (ev_009) linked employment, military transition support, and economic growth. Climate action was framed as economic opportunity (ev_040: clean power becoming cheaper than conventional). This suggestshe avoids isolated single-variable optimization, instead seeking policies that create reinforcing feedback loops across domains. Each intervention is designed to sense and act on cross-domain effects rather than treating domains as independent. Evidence: ev_021, ev_005, ev_009, ev_040
